control_description: Ensure DBA_USERS_WITH_DEFPWD view shows no users with default passwords
remediation: Immediately change default passwords for: SYS, SYSTEM, DBSNMP, APEX_PUBLIC_USER

control_description: Ensure AUDIT_TRAIL is set to DB_EXTENDED
remediation: Set AUDIT_TRAIL = DB_EXTENDED in Oracle initialization parameters and restart instance

control_description: Ensure CREATE SESSION privilege is revoked from PUBLIC
expected_value: PUBLIC should not have CREATE SESSION

control_description: Ensure REMOTE_OS_AUTHENT is set to FALSE
Ensure Latest SQL Server Service Packs and Hotfixes are installed
remediation: Apply latest CU to SQL Server 2019 ASAP
